text:
(MD-PPAS) file assigns Medicare providers to medical practices based on the tax identification numbers and elaborates on the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) provider specialty classification. This provider-level dataset is built around two identifiers: the national provider identifier (NPI) and the tax identification number (TIN).

What does this file include? (variable highlights)
The MD-PPAS contain data on specialty, TIN practice assignment, place of service information,
